3330960.name: USA Nature's Trails Jigsaw Edition - Expansion Pack 3
3330960.description: The new DLC for "USA Nature's Trails Jigsaw Edition - Expansion Pack 3" introduces 16 breathtaking puzzles, enriching your journey through America's natural wonders. This expansion brings a fresh array of challenges featuring stunning landscapes, from majestic mountain ranges and serene lakes to iconic national parks and vibrant autumn forests. Each puzzle is carefully designed to immerse you in the beauty of the USA's diverse ecosystems. It’s the perfect addition for nature lovers and puzzle enthusiasts eager to deepen their adventure through America's most awe-inspiring outdoor treasures.
